title: Krems an der Donau, Lower Austria — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Krems an der Donau, Lower Austria: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Krems an der Donau is a city in Lower Austria with a population of 25,036. A picturesque UNESCO-listed town in the Wachau Valley, famous for its apricot orchards, wine production, and beautifully preserved medieval old town.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
